entry.title: Re: Enhance Line Monitor POD with 'Last Indicator Value' Plugin in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hi Patrick,

Currently, DMi eSAC doesn’t display Asset Indicators, including the Last Indicator Values. However, you can easily store indicator values as Data Collections for example, which can then be displayed in DMi eSAC via the Data Collection MDO.

Hope it helps, Manoel

entry.title: 2025 BEx Sunset – Backstory, Options & Opportunities
entry.content:
SAP’s Glen Leslie recently joined APOS COO Allan Pym in a session to discuss the impending sunset of BEx and what options and opportunities BEx users have moving forward. You can view the webinar on demand here.

While BEx continues to be an SAP supported option for BW 7.5 deployments (BDC or non-BDC), a new external support challenge has come to the surface, and its implications are significant and near-term.

Microsoft has announced the end of extended support for Office 2016 and 2019 as of October 14, 2025, meaning there will be no new security updates or fixes, no bug fixes or feature updates, and no technical support from Microsoft. What does this mean for BEx users?

Starting in 1998, BW BEx was the front end for SAP Business Warehouse, but SAP ceased investment in BEx long ago. The last full version (BI 7.0 ADDON) was released in 2005. Since that release, SAP has mostly limited investment to “required adjustments.” The latest version of Microsoft Office that is compatible with BEx Analyzer is Office 2016. There will be no new adjustment.

The session covered:

  • BEx – Situation Today: solutions impacted
  • Overview of BEx Solutions: recommended actions and alternatives
  • Suggested Service Plan: SAP support options
  • Value: how APOS Publisher for Cloud can help you achieve your broadcasting objectives
  • Next Steps: how to get started

Glen opened with a concise problem statement: because BEx Analyzer has Microsoft Excel dependencies, and BEx does not support Microsoft Office beyond the 2016 and 2019 versions, and Microsoft will end support for these versions of Office as of October 14, 2025, SAP will end support for BEx Analyzer, BEx Workbooks and BEx Broadcaster as of the same date. SAP will continue to support tools that have no Excel dependency (BEx Query Designer, BEx Web Analyzer, BEx Web Application Designer) until December 31, 2030.

What Microsoft’s end of support for Office 2016/2019 means:

  • No technical support
  • No bug fixes
  • No security fixes
  • No protection from viruses, spyware and other malicious software

In the SAP blog post announcing the BEx sunset:

SAP strongly recommends to use SAP Analytics Cloud as the only enterprise end-to-end Analytics solution in the cloud. For Application Design and Custom Widgets you can use the Analytics Designer and for ad-hoc Analysis the Data Analyzer in SAC.
Please be aware that while those products have similar functionality as BEx they are not legal successors.
There is no 100% feature parity.

You can read SAP Note 2609031 on the BEx sunset here.

October 14, 2025, is coming faster than you think, and organizations already planning to transition from BEx to Analysis for Office, as well as those not yet aware of the BEx sunset, have a substantial amount of work to do before that date.

Glen provided additional information on BW end of mainstream support. I suggest you view the webinar on demand for a deeper dive into this information.

After an in-depth look at BEx solutions as they stand today, Glen provided information on the replacement path for the tools that will sunset in October.

Glen noted that SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office (AfO) is a separately licensed product and is not included with SAP BW. AfO licensing is available through SAP BusinessObjects, SAP Analytics Cloud, and SAP BPC.

Glen then moved on to the heart of the presenation: what organizations need to do to move on from BEx. To start with, these organizations can us the EarlyWatch Alert Report to see the magnitude of their BEx situation.

Customers sharing their EarlyWatch results with SAP can benefit from pre-assessment by the MaxAttention CoE:

  • The MaxAttention CoE conducted a pre-assessment to identify customers impacted by the upcoming BEx tools sunset in October 2025, leveraging EarlyWatch Alert report statistics
  • For customers who share their EarlyWatch data with SAP, proactive communication is already underway in 2025 to notify customers where sunsetting of BEx will have impact

SAP MaxAttention or SAP Premium Hub CoE can conduct a comprehensive pre-assessment of the customer's existing BEx footprint. This includes:

  • Identify the impact assessment of the BEx tools sunset
  • Identify inventory of active BEx Analyzer Workbooks and Broadcaster settings
  • Identifying Workbook complexity (macros, styles, custom scripts, multiple queries, variants, etc.)
  • Determining which components can be migrated to Analysis for Office or SAP Analytics Cloud
  • Establishing priorities and quick wins for migration

Outcome: A tailored migration roadmap that includes resource estimates, recommended tools (manual vs. automated conversion), potential risks, and business impact analysis

Glen then moved on to ongoing support options available from SAP:

SAP offers ongoing support through Premium Engagement services to ensure a successful and low-risk BEx tool conversion.

Again, for more detail, view the webinar on demand here.

Glen went on to describe the single-file BEx to AfO conversion process in detail…

…as well as the automated mass conversion process…

…as well as additional enhancements to reduce the manual effort required to convert workbooks.

Glen notes there are limitations to this process, including:

  • Styles
  • List of Conditions
  • List of Exceptions
  • VBA API
  • Navigation Pane

None of these elements are converted by the automated process.

Glen’s FAQs slide delves into the need for broadcasting alternatives. If you were using BW to schedule your BEx workbooks for broadcasting, you will need to find another way after the conversion of your workbooks to AfO.

As Glen notes, this is a key scenario with which APOS can assist you.

Allan Pym picked up the discussion with an analysis of the BEx Broadcaster workflows you can use APOS Publisher for Cloud to replace.

BEx Broadcaster will no longer be supported after October 2025. You can schedule AfO workbooks from SAP BusinessObjects, but many organizations are in the process of reducing and eliminating their BusinessObjects workflows and moving to SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). SAC is the SAP-preferred path for current and future Analytics workflows, but SAC Publications has serious limitations, particularly with timely, high-volume broadcasting, and with delivery to external stakeholders.

APOS Publisher for Cloud offers a flexible, scalable alternative for expanded scheduling and broadcasting.

In addition SAC Publications does not support AfO scheduling and broadcasting.

APOS has collaborated closely with the SAP AfO Product Team to support AfO broadcasting…

…and are in fact recommended by SAP for AfO scheduling and broadcasting in SAC.

APOS Publisher for Cloud lets you broadcast personalized analytics to the right people, at the right time, and in the right format.

Allan went on to describe the most salient features of this solution.

Allan concluded by presenting some typical use cases.

Glen returned to discuss next steps in your BEx conversion journey.

Key Takeaways

Glen concluded with Key Takeaways:

  • BEx Analyzer, BEx Workbooks and BEx Broadcaster (Pre-calculation) Reach End of Support by Oct 2025: Due to Microsoft ending support for Office 2016 and 2019 by October 14' 2025, SAP will no longer support Excel-based BEx tools after this date.
  • BEx WAD and BW Java Stack Supported Until 2030: BEx WAD and BW Java remain usable for customers on BW on HANA and BW/4HANA, aligned with SAP's extended maintenance timelines.
  • Migration to AO is Recommended: SAP recommends Analysis for Office and SAC as strategic replacements for BEx tools, offering enhanced functionality and longevity.
  • Mass Conversion Tool Available: SAP MaxAttention has developed a utility for mass conversion of BEx Workbooks to AO Workbooks, reducing effort by up to 8x compared to manual conversion.
  • Proactive follow-up by CoE: Impacted customers have been identified, and collaboration with TQMs is essential to position the appropriate conversion services and ensure proactive engagement to avoid customer’s last minute surprises.

entry.title: Re: Error creating workarea in SAP Enable Now
entry.content: Hi Shane, thank you so much for your reply. I've already tried contacting the administrator, but I still can't. I've tried filing a ticket, but I still can't. Do you know where I can contact for help? Thank you so much.

entry.content:
Boa tarde.

Alguma previsão para a entrega desses ajustes?

entry.title: IFRS or IndAS (Indian Accounting Standards) or INAP (India GAAP)?
entry.content:
For India company codes, what should be the accounting principle suggested by SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

Since there are only 2 options in CBC Activity 'Assign Accounting Principles to Ledgers and Company Codes' - IFRS/INAP....

The business is saying that INAP is for medium scale companies and Ind AS is for the larger companies where IndAS is similar to IFRS.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: IFRS or IndAS (Indian Accounting Standards) or INAP (...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Firstly if you are struggled to decide should you use IFRS or local GAAP for leading ledger when starting SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance, there are some important decisions you have to make for General Ledger Accounting. These links should assist in determining the appropriate assignments:

  • Assign Accounting Principles to Ledgers and Company Codes
  • Ledger Scenarios: Choosing the Right Combination for Your Business Needs
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition: Options for Accounting Principles and Ledgers
  • In-Depth with SAP S/4HANA – Ledger Scoping Q&A

Secondly, INAP is for medium scale companies and Ind AS is for the larger companies, where IndAS is similar to IFRS can be followed, but of course there could be an exception where even medium scale companies also adopt IFRS. We cannot not comment without understanding the business of the company.

In relation to assets, see Asset Accounting – Configuration Guide for SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition.

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to assign roles to Consolidation steps ?
entry.content:
Hi Titu,

 

MDG consolidation templates can be linked with Change request during activation step. This change request can then have agents determined based on roles or custom logic through BADI.

Hope this helps.


Regards

Anirban

entry.content: Olá Paulo! Obrigado! A métrica é para o uso da funcionalidade, independente de quando o documento foi emitido. Desde que esse documento foi processado pela solução.

entry.title: Re: HCM Brasil: Crédito do Trabalhador - eConsignado - Atualizações
entry.content:
Boa tarde.

Algum posicionamento sobre o problema relatado acima?

Grato.

entry.title: Re: HCM Brasil - Crédito do Trabalhador (eConsignado) - Primeira Entrega
entry.content:
Boa tarde.

Surgiu uma situação que não está sendo tratada pelo SAP.  Quando o funcionário tem mais de um empréstimo (contratos diferentes) no mesmo banco, com parcelas no mesmo período lançados no IT3453. No calculo da folha a função BRPID soma os descontos gerando apenas uma rubrica MCT0. Na geração do evento S-1200 vai a rubrica MCT0 (com o valor total) mas referencia apenas um dos contratos registrados, e pela norma do empréstimo consignado todos as parcelas descontadas com seus respectivos contratos devem ser informados.

entry.title: Re: Streamline Data Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA: Selective Data Transition with Time-Slice
entry.content:
@matthiasstegmue   

I have two more doubts and request your clarification.

1)  Can we use SDT in a scenaraio where the S4HANA instance is already productive. Customer wants to carve out a company code from an ECC environment with some selection on Organisation and Time slice.

2) Does SDT support Industry specific Transactional data and Masterdata ?

Thanks,

Balaji Jaganathan

entry.title: Re: HCM Brasil: Crédito do Trabalhador - eConsignado - Atualizações
entry.content:
Boa tarde @Huira,
A previsão de entrega para os cenários de mais de um contrato por empregado (Portaria MTE 933/2025) está prevista para o dia 18/07/2025.
Você pode verificar aqui o planejamento publicado no Regulatory Change Manager.
Qualquer dúvida, fico à disposição.

Atenciosamente,
Nathalia

entry.title: Overwrite Role in Enable Now (IPS)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Users and groups from IAS are provisioned to Enable Now using IPS.

Groups (IAS) are converted to roles in Enable Now.

If roles with the same name already exist in Enable Now (created manually), can IPS overwrite these roles?

Many Thanks

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: How to remove RFUI validations in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
To be able to check always the new released version of the Screen Personas, please go to the link https://wiki.scn.sap.com/wiki/display/SCM/How-To+Guides , navigate to How-To Guides for Warehouse Management as part of SAP S/4HANA Cloud and open the how-to guide Screen Personas for Mobile RF Devices in Warehouse Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Best regards,

Geovana

entry.content:
Hi Hariharan-Gandhi 

we plan to have combined instances and share the Cloud Logging service over several Subaccounts with User-Provided Service Instance.

Best regards

Thorsten

entry.title: Re: Configuring OAuth 2.0 and Creating an ABAP Program That Uses OAuth 2.0 Client API
entry.content:
I have configured OAuth2 configuration for the Fiori URL, which currently supports Basic Authentication.  I have successfully created a profile through Tcode OA2C_CONFIG and used OKTA as an Identity Provider (IDP). Additionally, I am able to obtain a Acess token via Tcode OA2C_GRANT, and the flow seems to be directing correctly to the Fiori URL.  However, I am encountering an issue where, when I open this Fiori URL in a new private browser session, it prompts for SAP credentials before asking for the OKTA login details. Ideally, it should authenticate purely through the OKTA user credentials without requiring any SAP credentials.

Could you please advise on how to resolve this issue?

entry.title: Triggering Breakpoint on BADI_SD_CM .
entry.content:
• Go to transaction SE18 and search for the standard BAdI BADI_SD_CM.

  • You'll notice that the standard implementation exists but is not active.

  •  

  • To proceed, create a custom implementation using transaction SE19.

  • Open the standard implementation class, such as UKM_SD_FSCM_INTEGR1.

  • Copy all methods from the standard class — not just the first one like FSCM_GET_ACCOUNT_KEY.

  • Be sure to include any PRIVATE and PROTECTED sections from the standard class.

  •  

  • Paste all copied methods and sections after all method definitions in your custom class .

  • Activate your custom implementation after completing the copy.

  • Set a breakpoint in the method FSCM_GET_MASTER_DATA inside your custom BAdI.

  • Execute transaction VA01, and your breakpoint should now trigger, allowing you to debug or insert custom logic as required.

entry.title: GOS PNG IN MM03 ERROR
entry.content:
Hi @everyone ,

I am currently working on project where i have to attach png images in mm03 ,

where i was able to attach it with pdf extension but when i tried to attach it as pdf it attach the file but it is corrupted file , anyone have face this before , that will be helpful , please respond as early as possible .

Please refer my previous blog for pdf attachment , i am using same program but i need to attach png/jpeg: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/facing-issue-in-gos-attachment-for-mm03/qaq-p/14139422

Sanket Gode.

entry.title: Re: BASEMEMBER as IF input
entry.content:
@jorge_sanchez5 

BASEMEMBER would not support referring to property of another dimension. It only supports a member id or parameter.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: The results of the data action "XXXXXXX" could not be...
entry.content: Client machine should have very limited role in the error you facing. I would suggest you check how much data each step of the Data Action generates when you execute and the other user executes. The error you posted is directly related to tenant memory being in sufficient.

entry.title: connecting to success factors from SOAP API fails
entry.content:
I am trying to query Compound API from SOAP UI.

1. Get WSDL.

2. Connect and get the JSession ID 

3. Use the JSession ID - set as a cookie into the request and send request to SF.

This keeps returning as below, if i change dates to more than 3 months, then i get a response that date range is too long( expected), however when date range is valid i get this response below.... 

<S:Envelope xmlns:S="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:SOAP-ENV="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
<SOAP-ENV:Header/>
<S:Body>
<S:Fault xmln<S:Envelope xmlns:S="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:SOAP-ENV="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
<SOAP-ENV:Header/>
<S:Body>
<queryResponse xmlns="urn:sfobject.sfapi.successfactors.com" xmlns:ns2="urn:fault.sfapi.successfactors.com">
<result>
<numResults>0</numResults>
<hasMore>false</hasMore>
<querySessionId>1ef94b42-18eb-47cb-9b64-8b389abe095b</querySessionId>
</result>
</queryResponse>
</S:Body>
</S:Envelope>

Any thoughts on what i am missing or doing in-correctly here.

entry.title: Re: Error while building app in App builder
entry.content: Hi! Me too. Getting the same error. Any solution?

entry.title: how to throw message in webdynpro
entry.content:
Hi there,

We are exploring the options to throw warning message in webdynpro.  Below code is given by AI tool to make it possible.  However, we want to implement it in BADI IF_WD_BADI_DOMODIFYVIEW~WDDOMODIFYVIEW. The only parameters available within this BADI method are FIRST_TIME, VIEW, WD_CONTEXT.  How can we get the view controller using these parameters? Thanks!

 

DATA: lo_api_controller TYPE REF TO if_wd_controller,
lo_message_manager TYPE REF TO if_wd_message_manager.
lo_api_controller = wd_this->wd_get_api( ).
lo_message_manager = lo_api_controller->get_message_manager( ).
lo_message_manager->report_warning(
  EXPORTING
message_text = 'This is a warning message.'
).

entry.title: Multiple Prices for a product
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Hello! 

In my industry a manufacturer will typically provide us with multiple prices for a product/item - i.e. 

Purchase Cost (price we buy it for)

Retail Cost (price they have set for retail sales to consumers)

Minimum-Advertised Price ( the lowest this product can be advertised  for) 

Jobber (which is a trade-resale guideline)

 

These are not calculated, they are provided by the supplier on a quarterly basis.

 

There doesn't seem to be a clean way to load these in to S/4 Hana Public Cloud.

 

In Business One, we can easily add a pricelist and then populate it for each item.

 

Thanks!


Chris

entry.title: Re: SAP S4/HANA Embedded EWM Configuration - Blog 1 - step by step Guide - Organization structure
entry.content: Thanks for sharing document, it is very helpful

entry.title: Re: 403 Forbidden Error on API-Proxy (BTP Integration Sui...
entry.content:
yes , this is surprise, I have replicated scenario in CI and it is working ,

Not sure because you are using trial account and having issues.

  • Catalog Connection worked
  • Discovery worked.

But not in test , looks like some surprise. 

 

My Local testing.

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi,

 somebody could tell me how resolve the following point. Becouse when we created the ticket, they response that these is not the way to do that.

  1. SAP Business Technology Platform

First, we shall validate the System Registration. To do this, Log in to your SAP BTP System, click on System Landscape, and then click on System; here, look for the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition system that you need for the Joule integration. If the system is listed, then we are good to proceed with the next steps. 

In case it is not listed, please create an SAP Incident/Support Ticket using the component CA-JOULE-PRV to request that your SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition systems be added to your BTP Accounts.

entry.title: Pricing Data missing on the Invoice Requests Object Work List (OWL) Screen
entry.content:
Hello,

In the workcenter view 'Customer Invoicing - Invoice Requests', in the tables the financial data for 'Net Value', 'Total' and 'List Price' is no longer being displayed. 

Thank you,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Pricing Data missing on the Invoice Requests Object W...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Hope all is well 

The Pricing data such as the mentioned fields 'Net Value', 'Total' and 'List Price' are not displayed for Outbound Delivery Invoice Request, accordingly to the system behavior. The reason is because the Pricing is determined on the previous Sales document, such as the Sales Order. The Outbound Delivery itself does not contain any pricing data, therefore, it is not passed to the Outbound Delivery Invoice Request.

Further information is documented on the following KBA: 1532554 - Net Value of Outbound Delivery Invoice Request is not Displayed (link: https://me.sap.com/notes/1532554).

Best Regards,

Marcelo
SAP Product Support

entry.title: • SAP Note 2348017 e • SAP Note 2220005
entry.content:
Olá, Boa tarde!

 

Alguém conhece essas duas Notas da SAP SAP Note 2348017 e SAP Note 2220005, se alguém tiver, poderia me enviar, por favor?

entry.title: Connect DPAgent hosted on our own Azure cloud to S4 Hana on SAP RISE connection to BTP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi experts!

For our SAP RISE contract we have only 1 DPAgent enabled, and now it is being used for another SAP integration. So we are planning to use our Azure to get a Windows/Linux Server to install our own DPAgent. We have previously installed DPAgents within our internal cloud network, for SQL connections to SAP Hana cloud.

The thing is that we are not sure if the procedure remains the same, because the DPAgent will be on our internal cloud network, so it doesn't have access to the same vnet as the SAP RISE S4 Hana. I know we will need public IP in our DPAgent server on azure, but after that the configurations remains the same? Or what would be the steps for this mixed integration (DPAgent self-hosted and S4 Hana SAP RISE, and BTP Datasphere)

Thanks in advance!

Best Regards,

Leo

entry.title: Correlation ID: 19715662052349928425023642598751 (SAC Planning sequence failure)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When I'm inputting the values and executing the planning sequence through variables embedded in save button backed with planning sequence variable, it is throwing the attached error.

Below are the steps I have done

1. created input template based on Live connection backed with SAP BW Bex query

2. Build Planning Model

3. Created story on Planned model and build input template

4. Tested saving option through publish option and ---it is successful

5. Tested through scripts by creating a save button in the input template and executed save button and it is --- successful

Here is the issue when we use planning sequence through scripts

6. created a planning sequence through BPC Planning sequence starter which has four variables

a. Fiscal period b. versions c. cost center d. company code (all are hierarchical variable)

Below is the scripts using

//Application.showBusyIndicator();
 
PS_1.getBpcPlanningSequenceDataSource().removeVariableValue("Z4CCINX02_MSTARTEND");
PS_1.getBpcPlanningSequenceDataSource().removeVariableValue("Z4CISNY02_VERSIONWVC");
PS_1.getBpcPlanningSequenceDataSource().removeVariableValue("Z4NIMMN01_COSTCTR");
PS_1.getBpcPlanningSequenceDataSource().removeVariableValue("Z4NIMMN01_COMPCODE");
 
//Moving Unique mstart  to Unique_MS1 array
for (var a = 0; a < MS1.length; a++) {
    if (!Unique_MS1.includes(MS1[a])) {
      Unique_MS1.push(MS1[a]);
    }
  }
 
//Moving Unique VER to Unique_VER array
for (var b = 0; b < VER.length; b++) {
    if (!Unique_VER.includes(VER[b])) {
      Unique_VER.push(VER[b]);
    }
  }
 
//Moving Unique CC to Unique_CC array
for (var c = 0; c < CC.length; c++) {
    if (!Unique_CC.includes(CC[c])) {
      Unique_CC.push(CC[c]);
    }
  }
 
//Moving Unique CCO to Unique_CCO array
for (var d = 0; d < CCO.length; d++) {
    if (!Unique_CCO.includes(CCO[d])) {
      Unique_CCO.push(CCO[d]);
    }
  }
 
//PS_1.openPromptDialog();
 
PS_1.getBpcPlanningSequenceDataSource().setVariableValue("Z4CCINX02_MSTARTEND",{values:Unique_MS1});
PS_1.getBpcPlanningSequenceDataSource().setVariableValue("Z4CISNY02_VERSIONWVC",{values:Unique_VER});
PS_1.getBpcPlanningSequenceDataSource().setVariableValue("Z4NIMMN01_COSTCTR",{values:Unique_CC});
PS_1.getBpcPlanningSequenceDataSource().setVariableValue("Z4NIMMN01_COMPCODE",{values:Unique_CCO});
 
 
// PS_1.openPromptDialog();
console.log(Unique_MS1);
console.log(Unique_VER);
console.log(Unique_CC);
console.log(Unique_CCO);
 
var publicVersion = Table_1.getPlanning().getPublicVersion("All Versions");
 
  if (publicVersion.isDirty()) 
  {
  PS_1.execute();
  publicVersion.publish();
  }
 
I'm not getting any parameters or scripts coding error in script logic, but when I post input values in input template and execute planning sequence through scripts im getting error as 
 

Error [Server]: (#629) Specify a value for variable Responsible Cost Center Hierarchy Node(s); MsgClass: BRAIN;; OlapMsgClass: 1;
Error [Server]: (#629) Specify a value for variable Company Hierarchy Node (Auth); MsgClass: BRAIN;; OlapMsgClass: 1;
Error [Server]: (#629) Specify a value for variable Time-Forecast; MsgClass: BRAIN;; OlapMsgClass: 1;
Error [Server]: (#629) Specify a value for variable Version-Forecast; MsgClass: BRAIN;; OlapMsgClass: 1;
Error [Application]: Error when setting variable structure

Correlation ID: 1614102746324694a094613360157562

Please help me if anyone is getting the similar issue and suggest recommendations/solutions .......

Thanks in advance!

 

# SAC

entry.title: Re: SAP Integrated Business Planning (SAP IBP) 2505 - Available Now!
entry.content: Thank you for the response Stephan. Will reach out to your team for further inputs required based on discussion with clients.

entry.title: Re: Test Automation Tool in post upgrade test
entry.content:
Dear Thomas,

We can apply the Test Plan Type filter to view the execution results in the Analyze Automated Test Results application.

The execution scope as well as the execution variant can be selected from the dropdown to filter the results accordingly.

Kind regards,
Latha

entry.title: Re: Test Automation Tool in post upgrade test
entry.content:
Dear Thomas,

Kindly refer to the help portal link

Post-Upgrade Tests 

Also check the below link for the details on the PUT Test.

PUT Regression Test Scoping – Manage Upgrade Tests App

entry.title: Re: How to Prevent or Force a Billing Document Split?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, I'm adding more documentations that are related to this query:

#Help Portal:

Billing Document Split and Convergence > One or more individual billing documents that each contain items from just one corresponding reference document ("one-to-one"). How to Prevent or Force a Billing Document Split

#KBA:  ##0002800221 - Billing Split in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. 

Hope it helps even more! ☺️.

Kind Regards,
Iza

entry.title: Re: test automation tool
entry.content:
Dear Thomas,

Kindly refer to the help portal link

Post-Upgrade Tests 

Also check the below link for the details on the PUT Test.

PUT Regression Test Scoping – Manage Upgrade Tests App

entry.title: Re: Why is a portion of my annotation file not being reco...
entry.content: Hello, I got it to work. I had to reference a different entity type than the previous one I was using. When using "UI.LineItem" annotation, the entity I used worked just fine but not for "Common.ValueList". Here is the final solution to get the rearrangement of fields working properly. Thank you all!

entry.title: SF Recruiting Multi-Location Job Postings
entry.content:
Hello community,

We are implementing EC, RCM, and RMK for a client who requires the ability to multi-select countries and cities for job postings. Since SAP standard country and state fields are single-select, we are seeking best practices for supporting multi-location postings while staying aligned with SAP guidelines.

Key Requirements:

  • Only US locations should be visible/searchable to external candidates; all (US and non-US) locations should be available to internal candidates.
  • Recruiters need to select multiple locations for internal postings (US and non-US) and multiple US cities for external postings.

Current Proposed Approach:

  1. Use standard country/state fields for US locations, which will drive external site search/filtering.
  2. Use the standard location object (location_obj) to multi-select all locations for internal postings, as per KBA 2652937.
  3. Create custom mfields for US and Non-US locations to display all valid locations as tokens in job descriptions.

Questions:

  • Has anyone addressed similar requirements and found a more efficient way to avoid duplicate entry and ensure all selected locations are searchable?
  • Are there best practices or alternative approaches that reduce recruiter effort and maintain SAP compliance?

Any advice or lessons learned would be appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: LMS Data Story Report
entry.content: Thank you so much, this worked perfectly!

entry.title: Re: how to bring consolidation group in the public cloud...
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a possibility to influence the consolidation group ?

We would like to use the consolidation group to influence the storage bin in the packing center. but this is possible only if we are capable to determine the consolidation group at the outbound creation.

Best regards

entry.title: XDL API Filtering Options
entry.content:
Hi all,

In the SAP HANA version of the XDL API, are there any options for filtering through the results apart from creating custom logic to parse through the response? I'm trying to automate checking the status of XDL Jobs and would like to see if there's an easier way of definitively finding the proper job.

Thanks!

This blog is truly inspiring! I’m impressed not only by how you identified what was missing and built it yourself, but also by how polished and well-thought-out your solution is.

entry.title: Re: I Built LangChain-lite for ABAP, and Solved the Enterprise AI Cold Start Problem
entry.content: @MioYasutake thanks a million, appreciate your kind words ^_^

entry.title: Re: I Built LangChain-lite for ABAP, and Solved the Enterprise AI Cold Start Problem
entry.content:
Oh! forgot to mention, that the coolest way to test JSON/Table content chaining is to try this program:

ZLLM_00_REPL, you will see something like this:


and then you can apply each step of the "flow" one by one by pressing 
Exec Step 1, Exec Step 2, Exec Step 3, Exec Step 4

and see how the output of one step consumed by the other:



More on Architecture:  zllm/ARCHITECTURE.md

Framework Guide: zllm/GUIDE.md

entry.title: Re: 403 Forbidden Error on API-Proxy (BTP Integration Sui...
entry.content:
ok, one step back , Can you try calling the SAP url htpps://host:port/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner?sap-client=xxx&$top=5 from postman and see, are you able to get response. 

replace Host with SAP Host only and client number.

entry.title: service layer error -1116
entry.content:
We recently upgraded to SAP Business One 10.0.

I'm currently testing some Service Layer (SL) features to integrate with our .NET ASP core application.

The login test via Postman works perfectly. However, when attempting to cancel a sales order using the following endpoint:

 

POST /b1s/v1/Orders(xxxx)/Cancel

I receive this error response:

{ "error": { "code": -1116, "message": { "lang": "en-us", "value": "Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected during transaction" } } }

In the SAP client/server, we couldn't find the folder or location where Service Layer logs are stored to get more detailed information.

Has anyone faced this issue or knows how to resolve it?
Any help or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: badi
entry.content:
Hello @jerrysam 

Your requirement to automatically populate the PO header text based on the selected tax code typically requires In-App Extensibility, and yes, the recommended approach is using a BAdI (Business Add-In).

To clarify,

  • You cannot achieve this via standard configuration alone; automation based on tax code needs custom logic
  • The correct BAdI can be found using the Custom Logic app within the Extensibility menu
  • You can search for BAdIs under the business context Purchase Order (API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV)

If a suitable BAdI for header text population is available, you can implement it using key user tools; no ABAP backend access is needed in Public Cloud.

You can check the SAP Help documentation, SAP Help – Extensibility and BAdI Implementation in Public Cloud

Thank you and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: User Login wise Documents restriction access needed (...
entry.content:
Hi,

To address the issue of data ownership control in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, you can implement authorization restrictions to ensure that users can only access and modify sales orders they have created. Here are the steps to achieve this:

Steps to Restrict Access

  1. Create Custom Roles: Start by creating custom roles for your users. You can copy the standard role template, such as ‘SAP_BR_SALES_REPRESENTATIVE’, and modify it according to your business needs.

  2. Adjust Catalog Assignments: Assign the necessary business catalogs to the custom role. Ensure that the catalogs related to sales order processing are included.

  3. Maintain Restrictions: Tips & tricks to build a custom purchaser role wit… Set restrictions based on the ‘Created By’ field in the sales order. This can be done by maintaining restrictions in the business role configuration. You can specify that users can only read, write, or access value help for sales orders they have created.

  4. Assign Roles to Users: Assign the custom roles to the respective users. This ensures that each user has access only to the sales orders they have created.

  5. Test the Configuration: Log in as a test user and verify that the restrictions are working as intended. Ensure that users cannot access or modify sales orders created by others.

Best regards, Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: 国内跨公司销售POD不生效
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, the configuration for sales processes involving different companies can be complex due to the system’s handling of intercompany transactions. When dealing with cross-company sales, where the factory and sales organization belong to different companies, certain configurations such as the ‘Proof of Delivery’ (POD) might not function as expected.

Key Points:

  • Movement Type Configuration: The movement type 601 is typically used for standard sales processes, while 687 is associated with advanced intercompany sales S4/HANA Cloud高级公司间销售和高级公司间库存转储-流程简介 - SAP Community processes involving Valuated Stock in Transit (VSiT). The inability to use POD in cross-company sales might be due to the system defaulting to movement type 601 instead of 687.
  • Configuration Restrictions: The IMG setting ‘Set Up Correlation of Sell from Stock with VSiT Process’ 高级公司间销售和高级公司间库存转储 2208版本常见问题集锦 - SAP Community does not allow configuration for scenarios where the factory and sales organization belong to different companies. This restriction can prevent the use of certain advanced features like POD in cross-company sales.

Solution:

To resolve this issue, you may need to review and adjust the configuration settings related to intercompany sales processes. This might involve:

  • Ensuring that the correct movement types are configured for intercompany transactions.
  • Checking if the advanced intercompany sales processes (such as those involving VSiT) are properly activated and configured.

Best regards, Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: Trigger automatic follow-up survey 30 minutes before...
entry.content:
Hi @imit 

Yes, currently the Learning surveys only get triggered after the users complete the items' contents or get a completion recorded.

There have been some enhancements requests on it, and our customers are welcomed to vote for them and/or create additional requests. For example:

  • https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/281801

For more details on enhancement requests, please check the KBA 2090228 - How to submit enhancement ideas for SAP SuccessFactors Products.

BR,

entry.content:
Dear SAP CAL Team,

I deployed the “SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS03" template like an CAL Appliance but when I try to connect via RDP access point connection it shows me the message in the figure bellow

The Windows Remote Desktop VM it is active.

The RDP access point into Appliance's configuration is 'Default' accordingly Appliance template.

And in Windows configurations system, I checked the port 3389 in the remote desktop connection configuration and it was ok. 

 

Someone has a trip?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Using APIs to Migrate Incentive Management Commission...
entry.content: I found out that by using this URL, it gives me ALL the rule elements for a specific plan:

entry.title: Re: Using APIs to Migrate Incentive Management Commission...
entry.content:
I found an API URL that brings back ALL the rule elements for a plan for a specific time period.  In this case, it's for a plan with a ruleelementownerseq of 6473924464346747 for 2025.

https://XXXX.app.commissions.cloud.sap/mtsvc/tcmp/rest/v2/associated/ruleElementsForPlan?endDate=12/31/2025&startDate=01/01/2025&ownerSeq=6473924464346747&_=1749671321502&removeDate=01/01/2200&isLast=1&modelSeq=0

entry.title: Re: What's the future of SAP technical consultant?
entry.content:
Hi @KaranShah31,

Sharing my perspective as a technical SAP consultant based in France, based on recent client projects and hands-on experience. Clients are steadily shifting toward cloud architectures and adopting modern SAP technologies. Staying relevant requires continuous learning.

1. What is the future for SAP technical consultants?
To me, it is clearly centered around BTP. I have already worked on several projects involving RAP, and I’ve seen ABAP Cloud being used by clients. I’m also increasingly working with CAP, which I find particularly powerful. These frameworks are key to building clean core, cloud-native SAP extensions, which is the direction SAP is moving toward.

2. Is it worth investing time in RAP, BTP, or AI?
Absolutely. RAP, ABAP Cloud, CAP, or cloud extensibility techniques are becoming essential skills. A solid understanding of the broader BTP ecosystem is also key — including solution architecture, application deployment, CI/CD pipelines, Git integration, DevOps practices, and runtime environments like Cloud Foundry and Kyma. BTP is a rich and exciting toolbox.

3. Are these technologies really used in projects?
Yes. Over the past few years, all my projects have been centered around modern SAP technologies and frameworks, with BTP components always involved. Adoption is real and growing.

I have not yet used AI in client projects, and I personally prefer to wait until the current hype stabilizes a bit before diving deeper into it. That said, I am convinced that clients will soon need AI to stay competitive, which will naturally drive system modernization and broader adoption of S/4HANA and BTP. These tools are no longer experimental; they are real and in use.

If you are unsure, give it a try. SAP offers a full-featured BTP trial environment for free, along with plenty of learning resources. It’s a great opportunity to explore, learn, and enjoy the journey!

entry.title: Re: How to use the OData Client Proxy in SAP S/4 HANA or How to use the OData Service Consumption Mo
entry.content:
@Andre_Fischer 

Thank you for this great blog...

I was able to follow all the steps and successfully consume the OData service in my S/4 2023 On-premise with one difference shown in BOLD:

 

DATA:

ls_entity_key TYPE zz_cl_measdocs=>tys_measurement_document_type,

ls_business_data TYPE zz_cl_measdocs=>tys_measurement_document_type,

lo_http_client TYPE REF TO if_web_http_client,

lo_resource TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_resource_entity,

lo_client_proxy TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_client_proxy,

lo_request TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_request_read,

lo_response TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_response_read.

 

TRY.

" Create http client

*DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement(

* comm_scenario = '<Comm Scenario>'

* comm_system_id = '<Comm System Id>'

* service_id = '<Service Id>' ).

*lo_http_client = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( lo_destination ).

lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_factory_remote=>create_v4_remote_proxy(

EXPORTING

is_proxy_model_key = VALUE #( repository_id = 'DEFAULT'

proxy_model_id = 'ZZ_MEASDOCS'

proxy_model_version = '0001' )

io_http_client = lo_http_client " TYPE REF TO IF_WEB_HTTP_CLIENT

iv_relative_service_root = '<service_root>' ).

ASSERT lo_http_client IS BOUND.

" Set entity key

ls_entity_key = VALUE #(

measurement_document = 'MeasurementDocument' ).

" Navigate to the resource

lo_resource = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'MEASUREMENT_DOCUMENT' )->navigate_with_key( ls_entity_key ).

" Execute the request and retrieve the business data

lo_response = lo_resource->create_request_for_read( )->execute( ).

lo_response->get_business_data( IMPORTING es_business_data = ls_business_data ).

CATCH /iwbep/cx_cp_remote INTO DATA(lx_remote).

" Handle remote Exception

" It contains details about the problems of your http(s) connection

CATCH /iwbep/cx_gateway INTO DATA(lx_gateway).

" Handle Exception

CATCH cx_web_http_client_error INTO DATA(lx_web_http_client_error).

" Handle Exception

RAISE SHORTDUMP lx_web_http_client_error.

ENDTRY.

 

I was not able to find a class method to instantiate lo_http_client (TYPE REF TO IF_WEB_HTTP_CLIENT) in the above code since there is no communication arrangement in the S/4 system. Instead I had to change the proxy call to 

      cl_http_client=>create_internal(
       importing
         client      = data(lo_http_client) " TYPE REF TO IF_HTTP_CLIENT
       ).

lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_client_proxy_fact=>create_v4_remote_proxy(
         io_http_client = lo_http_client
         is_proxy_model_key = value #( repository_id = /iwbep/if_cp_registry_types=>gcs_repository_id-default
         proxy_model_id = to_upper( 'ZZ_CL_MEASDOCS' )
         proxy_model_version = 0001 )
         iv_relative_service_root = lv_relative_service_root ).

To be clean core compliant, we need to use class /iwbep/cl_cp_factory_remote because /iwbep/cl_cp_client_proxy_fact is not clean core!

Any suggestion on how to instantiate lo_http_client TYPE REF TO if_web_http_client in the S/4 environment?

Thanks,

Saeed

entry.title: Re: Options for multilingual content
entry.content:
Hi @RafaelHernandez 

To avoid opening several tabs, your team may consider disabling the setting '' at the contents' records.

  • https://me.sap.com/notes/0003424466
  • https://me.sap.com/notes/0003584864
  • https://me.sap.com/notes/0003584864 

Now, regarding contents with multiple languages, the standard options available are the ones you mentioned: the content itself needs to offer the option to be launched in different languages; or different contents (one for each language) need to be associated to the item and the users launches the one they want.

  • https://me.sap.com/notes/0003079807

Alternatively, to have a different system behavior, it would be possible to have an enhancement request created for it (as per KBA 2090228), where the Learning Product Management team can further review and assess the requested functionality to be considered in a future release.

BR,

entry.title: Re: Unable to pull the data correctly from LMS report.
entry.content:
Hi @Ramya9 

It might be worth posting your query at the Community dedicated to custom reports: SAP SuccessFactors Learning Custom Report Exchange

Best regards,

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch München (07/2025)
entry.content:
Liebe Stammtischschwestern und -brüder,

wir treffen uns am Donnerstag, den 10.07., zum SAP Stammtisch. Lasst uns in schönem gemütlichen Ambiente zum Thema SAP und drumherum austauschen.

Wir haben diesen Monat als Themenschwerpunkt die neue SAP Sales und Service Cloud v2 mit zwei Experten auf dem Gebiet:

  • Andreas Neumeier (SAP) mit einem kurzen Überblick über die Funktionalitäten
  • Johannes Engelke (Freelance) zum Vorgehen bei Erweiterungen mit side-by-side Extensions

Wir treffen uns im SWM Innovationslabor (S03.001, Emmy-Noether-Straße 2, 80992 München).
Bitte haltet auch eure Zu- und Absage aktuell, damit wir die richtige Personenzahl für unsere Planung haben.

Wir freuen uns auf Euer kommen und einen regen Austausch!
SAP Stammtisch Orga Team

entry.title: Multiple users for Project Controller role in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi colleagues!

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition (Professional Services), only one Project Controller can be assigned per project.

However, in customer case, multiple users from different countries need to post timesheets on the project

To stay audit-compliant, each user must use their own business user and role.

Question: What’s the best practice (or workaround) to support multiple users posting time as “project controllers” with audit traceability?

entry.title: Couldn't import object. Parent resource does not exist- Importing an object to SAC Production Tenant
entry.content:
Hello Everyone - When we are trying to import a package to SAC Production tenant, it is giving an error message, "Couldn't import object <Object Name>. Parent resource does not exist.

I added the model, which I used to create a model. I ensured not to select dependent object as I don't want to impact any other objects in production tenant. But after the package is generated, I see a few dependent dimensions as well as data locking configuration. I compared the data locking between production and quality tenants. It seems a little different. Hence I don't want to take the risk. 

I tried importing the model and it's dimensions excluding the locking. It still fails with the same message.

Thanks,

Phani

entry.title: Re: Criterio al articulo 29 de la Ley del INFONAVIT
entry.content: Hola Juan, el ticket lo tiene el departamento de desarrollo de SAP, no me han dado novedades.

entry.title: New Service: Deployment Readiness Check for SAP Sales and Service Cloud v2
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community! 

 

Launching a new system can feel uncertain. You want everything to work smoothly, that’s why we’ve introduced a new Continuous Quality Check (CQC) for Deployment Readiness, designed just for SAP Sales and Service Cloud v2.

Picture this,  you are weeks from a go-live. Your team is ready, but something is missing: Performance tuning, a misconfigured setting, or an unseen risk. That’s when this new CQC makes the difference to give you a snapshot of system readiness, it is fast, remote, and with guidance built for your SAP Sales and Service Cloud v2 setup.

This expert-led service analyzes the key elements that make or break a smooth go-live:

  • System stability – Can your solution handle real-world use from day one?

  • Configuration health – Are your setup choices aligned with expected outcomes?

  • Security and performance – Are you meeting essential standards for resilience and scale?

You don’t need to add tools or extend your project timeline. It runs remotely, with minimal effort on your side.

This isn’t just a review. It’s about preventing problems before they occur and ensuring your deployment delivers the value you planned for.

You’ll get:

  • A clear report on risk areas

  • Specific recommendations

  • Alignment with SAP best practices

 

If you are wondering when to use this service, it is ideal:

  • Six weeks before go-live

  • After major system changes, launching new features, or as a health check. 

  • Ahead of key milestones in multi-phase rollouts

 

If you would like to know how to request it in SAP for Me, and have a full breakdown of scope, benefits, and technical coverage, please review the info sheet

Because go-live isn’t the end, it’s the start of something better.


Easy steps, amazing CX!

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

About the author:

Edmar Rodríguez is a Topic Expert for the SAP Customer Experience Value Map. He helps customers make the most of their SAP Enterprise Support maintenance contract by guiding them through the available tools and services at their disposal. 

Have questions or want to keep the conversation going? We’d love to hear from you! Feel free to reach out to the SAP Customer Experience Value Map team at SAPESValueMaps@sap.com. And if you haven’t yet, sign up for the SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps to explore more resources, best practices, and expert guidance.

entry.title: Re: STO Process: NCCR / 107 Posting in Transit
entry.content:
Hi Francois

The value of the stock must belong to someone. If it does not belong to the receiving plant, then it must belong to the issuing plant.

Knowing that, then if you tell us that the receiving plant stock must be valuated only when it arrives to the plant, then you are not in the correct scenario in first place.

I think the correct scenario for you should be STO N2 instead of STO N1, since N2 does not manage stock in transit in the receiving plant but in the issuing plant.

In this scenario, after you post the GI of the OBD delivery in the issuing plant, nothing happens in the receiving plant. Instead of that, the stock is moved from unrestricted in the issuing plant to issuing stock in transit. This means that the value of the stock still belongs to the issuing plant, but physically, it is not available anymore there.

From that point, to transfer the title of the goods and therefore its value to the receiving plant, VLPOD transaction should be performed. N2 scenario will post the quantity and value of the goods directly to the receiving plant stock, with usual 101 movement type without any receiving transit.

Hope this explanation helps a bit.

Regards.

 

Miguel

entry.title: Re: I have a question where there is a parameter in one o...
entry.content:
iman_roy is correct. Sometimes this is at the job level, sometimes at the calling workflow level, in the 'Variable and Parameters' window, there will be a second tab at the bottom named 'Calls'. If you click on this, you will see the 'Argument value' that being passed to the dataflow parameter. Normally it's a variable, but can also be a constant. Wish I could attach a screen capture in a reply.

*edited: figured out how to attach an image*

entry.title: How to limit a specific group's access to learning (LMS) and ensure this group don't use LMS licence
entry.content:
Hypothetical question. 

What is the best way to ensure that when we integrate a specific group of users, that they can access platform(BizX) and performance(PMGM), without being able to access learning(LMS) and use licences?

Do we manage this via setting up a new Manage Permission Role -removing the “Learning Access Permission” and then assign the relevant group to it via Manage permission groups? Or can we manage this via the User Connector or another method?

If you have done this, what worked for you? 

 

Many Thanks

entry.title: Re: Why SAP Cloud Identity Matters for SAP Task Center: It’s About Trust and Global User ID
entry.content:
Hi @ivelinakiryakov ,

I Refer to Point 7 above,

"Proposed approach:

  • Start the user provisioning from SAP AS ABAP source system to the Identity Directory target system. This is needed because SAP AS ABAP serves as the user base for SAP S/4HANA. See SAP Application Server ABAP (Source) and Local Identity Directory (Target) . "

This is the first time that I have seen in a SAP blog or other doco the IAS combination of ( SAP Application Server ABAP (Source) and Local Identity Directory (Target) ) is mentioned when discussing reading entities. In all other blogs and scenario doco that I have seen so far its normally the IAS combination with Source system XXXX and Identity Authentication as target.  

As yet I have not been able to get a clear picture of the use cases as to when one would use Identity Authentication as target. compared to using Local Identity Directory (Target) as target connector in Cloud Identity Services - IPS.

Can you please explain the use cases as to when Identity Authentication as target is required to be used as the Target connector and the use cases when Local Identity Directory (Target) is required to be used as the Target connector.  I have seen in QnAs and blogs that a number of people have ask this question in the recent past but the response provided has not clearly explained the two use cases.

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards,  

Steve

entry.title: Re: AI Launchpad, Generic Secret Creation Error, Creation...
entry.content: Thanks! One step close.

entry.title: Impact on implementing the note 3112362
entry.content:
Hi Team,We are currently in the preparation phase of our SAP S/4 HANA and are planning to implement the SAP  3112362  note - SAP Readiness Check for SAP ERP Usage and Data Profiling in our ECC system. 

Before proceeding, we would like to understand the potential impact of implementing the note on our system.

Please help us with the below details.

  1. Potential impact of implementing this note on our production system, especially in terms of performance or stability during data collection.
  2. Whether this note should be implemented during non working hours to avoid impact
  3. Required pre requisites and dependencies 
  4. Any known issues or recommendations from past implementations of this note
  5. Any post implementation activities needs to be performed to complete the set up.

    Your support in clarifying these points will help us plan the implementation effectively.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Impact on implementing the note 3112362
entry.content:
Hi Customer,

Regarding your questions, please find the following answers:

1.Potential impact of implementing this note on our production system, especially in terms of performance or stability during data collection. 

 =>During the data collection phase, some performance impact maybe occur, especially on large systems or systems with high transactional volume. For example: Increased CPU and memory usage while data collectors are running. However, no known critical performance/stability risks have been reported directly related to this note. Yon don't have to worry about this.

2.Whether this note should be implemented during non working hours to avoid impact
=>While the note can technically be implemented during business hours,  you may apply and execute it during non-peak or non-working hours, especially in production environments, to avoid unintended performance issues.

3.Required prerequisites and dependencies 
=>All of the prerequisites are documented in KBA itself. Please check Reason and Prerequisites part in KBA 3112362 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP ERP Usage and Data Profiling

4.Any known issues or recommendations from past implementations of this note
=> Currently no known issues recorded for this note.

5.Any post implementation activities needs to be performed to complete the set up.
=>Please check and read carefully Reason and Prerequisites & Solution part in KBA 3112362 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP ERP Usage and Data Profiling

 

Sincerely,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: manifest.json always 404 in launchpad
entry.content: after changing the service name to tes.main, same issue appear.

entry.title: Upgrading to CAP CDS 8: When using the $batch request, req.req.authInfo is undefined.
entry.content:
In our CDS 7 version project, getting a user's email is written like this. We can normally get the user's information.

req.req.authInfo.getEmail();

But in the CDS 8 version, using the same method, you can only get it normally if the request is not a $batch request.

Looking at the source code, we found that the value of cds.env.features.odata_new_adapter in version cds8 is set to true by default, and the new adapter is being used. Is it possible that the new adapter didn't process the authInfo for the $batch request?

The authentication method we use is xsuaa. So in the cds8 version, should we use cds.context.attr or req.user.attr to obtain user information?

entry.title: Re: AI Launchpad, Generic Secret Creation Error, Creation...
entry.content: Thanks! One step closer. Then errors came up that "url" and "description" were also required, at least in today's version. After filling those out those errors went away. Now I got to "Error Code: 500 Message: Internal server error. Check the logs and raise a support ticket if necessary.". BTW, the Base64 value for NoAuthentication is "Tm9BdXRoZW50aWNhdGlvbg==".

entry.title: OpenText VIM 7.6 SP3 for SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hi All,

Currently we are upgrading from OpenText Vendor Invoice Management 7.0 all the way to OpenText Vendor Invoice Management 7.6 SP3 for SAP ECC, 
We are facing issue where the Status for document posted through VIM Workplace are stuck as "Indexed" in /n/opt/vim_va2 (New VIM Analytics) while the status in VIM_1HEAD table and Old VIM Analytics /n/opt/vim_analytics are correctly showing Posted.
Are there any setting or config required for /n/opt/vim_va2 so that it will update accordingly?
We are unable to get the old data from /n/opt/vim_analytics to show up in /n/opt/vim_va2 as well

entry.title: Re: reg:Transfer posting from one sales order to another sales order( V C)
entry.content: Can you tell me the solution

entry.title: Re: Cost Center Standard Hierarchy Change from CE2502 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear @lea77 , 

Thank you for the additional query. 

Regarding the migration topic, you may refer to below information. 
How to Migrate Cost Center Groups to Global Hierarchies | SAP Help Portal

Best Regards, 
Minyu

entry.title: RF password is flashing (Revealing the letters) before turning into **
entry.content:
Hi All, 

The password field is revealing before changing itself into **. 

I have used used below in the HTML template but its not working. We are on ECC 6.6

`<input type="password" style="-webkit-text-security: circle;" readonly="readonly" tabindex="-1" `

Any workarounds or sample codes, greatly appreciated. Thanks.

-Srinivas

entry.title: Re: Collected information about workload classes in context of SAP HANA (with example)
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"

  1. In SAP HANA Studio I executed the commands with 'SYSTEM' user and setup the workload class for 'DB_ADMIN' user to manage the 'HDBStudio' related executions. The goal is to reject execution from this user while high CPU usage of the system.
  2. I checked the workload class with 'SYSTEM' user by using "HANA_Workload_WorkloadClasses_" report.
  3. I generated CPU load on the server (with executing different reports in same time).
  4. I executed SQL statement with 'DB_ADMIN' user. It failed.
  5. I checked the workload class, admission control events with 'SYSTEM' user by using "HANA_Workload_AdmissionControlEvents_" report (EVENT_REASON)."

Thanks for your selfless sharing, it really help us great a lot.

 

🙂

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: How can I update an OData-Service (/IWFND/MAINT_SERVI...
entry.content:
Hi,

Try loading the metadata from /N/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE by selecting the service and click the Load Metadata button. Clear your browser cache and check the $metadata URL. http://<Your_odata_service>/$metadata.

entry.title: Reservation Document Output for S/4HANA CLOUD 2502
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts!

I am currently exploring if it would be possible to have an output/printed form for the reservation document regardless of whether this is created automatically or manually.

In the Output Parameter Determination app, there is a dropdown for reservation document.
I have followed the steps defined in the Scope ID 1LQ for Output Management: assigned the form template and defined the parameters.

I created a manual reservation and there was no output determined.
Can anyone help me if there are any missing steps?

Thank you.
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition MM (Materials Management) MM Inventory Management

entry.title: Re: Does anyone use the SAP Interview Scheduling feature?
entry.content: hi

entry.title: Re: Enhanced FinOps Capabilities for SAP BTP
entry.content: This is great news for customers!

entry.title: Re: How to link screen-painter element to custom table
entry.content:
Hi,

Try adding the field in the screen flow logic.

PROCESS AFTER INPUT.
FIELD date_ago.

"if you need specific function for field
PROCESS AFTER INPUT.
CHAIN.
FIELD date_ago
MODULE spec_function.
ENDCHAIN.

"if you need to trigger another function when the field changes
PROCESS AFTER INPUT.
CHAIN.
FIELD data_ago
MODULE another_function ON CHAIN-REQUEST.
ENDCHAIN.

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM ABAP - RF Device Cookie (or any mechanism to track individual devices)
entry.content:
Hi Daniil,

The solution is already existing. It works on desktop running SAP GUI on Windows. It is calling the function module TH_USER_INFO, and it is reading from table USR41. From here we can get the terminal ID then map it to a printer from a custom table. It is a PPF customization. Customized. ABAP Custom Code. Customer Specific. 

Now, RF devices are introduced, calling the function module TH_USER_INFOR nor reading table USR41 isn't working. Again, it was planned to reuse the existing customer specific ABAP code with the hope of minimal modification. 

Anyhow, it was decided instead of using terminal ID, user ID will be used.

entry.title: Re: Custom Header in CPI
entry.content: Yes, I have saved the local variable content in the property - po_number and thank you for your suggestion it works that way. 😄

entry.title: Re: connecting to success factors from SOAP API fails
entry.content:
Hi,

There is most likely no data for the date range selected. Check that the date range matches an effective employee record. If this is not the issue ensure that the SF user has the right permissions.

entry.title: SF Report Story for Performance Distribution
entry.content:
hey Guys,

I am trying to create a performance management distribution report using Distribution % as the measure. PM rating as the dimension and Gender as the Colour. 

Trying to mimic below in the chart. Distribution by gender and PM rating. Total percentage for Male 100% and total % for Female is 100%

 

I have created a calculated measure to get the distribution  and the calculation is count/count.

my fields

Calculation for Dis

My output is

What I need is 50% male in Achieving 50% male in Exceeding and 100% Female in unrated.

How do I achieve this? what is the logic for the Measure?

SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics

entry.title: Apply header-level freight split to line items based on quantity.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have configured the system as per the requirement: “Apply header-level freight split to line items based on quantity.” However, the system is still not behaving as expected.

Kindly review and assist. Thank you

Best regards,
MK
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Re: Adding Revlv field in ME2M Report
entry.content:
Hi,

Try to use dynamic programming to adapt the structure (im_struct_name) at runtime.

data dref type ref to data.
field-symbols <fs_outtab> type any.

create data dref type (im_struct_name).
assign dref->* to <fs_outtab>.

loop at ch_outtab assigning <fs_outtab>.
"------
"your logic
endloop.

entry.title: Avoid rescheduling of Production Order when adding Rework operations
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have simple requirement to capture rework material and labor cost per work center. We are looking into manually adding rework operation anything there is a need to rework some of the units. For example Production order has 4 operations with order quantity of 10 EA . First 2 operation are completed and final confirmed. Now we are on 3rd operation and there is a need to rework 3 units. We are planning to manually add a rework operation with rework control key. We can adding all the components required for this rework to this operation and charge the labor hours to it. 

Everything works when it comes to confirming material and labor hours. Our issue is when we add rework operation, system reschedule all the confirmed operation (my understanding this is standard behavior) and changes order header dates. This is messing up our weekly schedule and On-time matrix. 

I have tried changing 'Shift Order' setting Production order Scheduling parameter. Removing scheduling check from rework control key but no luck.

We understand we can use trigger point to either add rework operation or create rework order however our rework is very simple and we don't want to go all the work to setup the master data to support this. 

My question is, is there a way to influence standard system behavior to not reschedule order when we add rework operation.

Thank you!!
